summary: 2 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Weapons
film.announcement: Zach Cregger teased his 'Weapons' prequel and its approach to Gladys' origin story at Comic-Con.

film.title: Ebenezer
film.announcement: First trailer released for Ti West's 'Ebenezer' starring Johnny Depp.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: Devon Allman cast in his first major acting role in AMC's NASCAR drama series.

tv.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe
tv.announcement: Comic-Con panel teased a DC episode and the return of the original character OG as the Big Bang Theory franchise makes its Comic-Con return.
Brad Bird expressed that '1906' would 'lend itself' to adaptation as a TV miniseries during a Comic-Con career panel.
